scenario.total_quantity_context: Annual procurement for 3 regional offices (Bengaluru, Mumbai, Delhi)

vendors.name: Crestline Systems Pvt. Ltd.
vendors.profile: Mid-size IT hardware distributor, strong in South India, ISO 9001 certified. Known for reliable delivery but not the cheapest.

vendors.name: Orbitex Technologies Ltd.
vendors.profile: Aggressive pricing, pan-India reach. Has had delivery delays in past quarters. Missing several compliance certifications.

vendors.name: Pinnacle InfoSolutions
vendors.profile: Oldest vendor in the mix. Premium pricing, excellent certifications, slow but dependable. Strong after-sales.

vendors.name: SwiftEdge Procurement Co.
vendors.profile: Newest entrant. Suspiciously low prices across the board, claims fast delivery, ticks every certification box — but thin track record. Red flag vendor.

vendors.name: Meridian Tech Supplies
vendors.profile: Solid mid-market option. Good certifications, average pricing, some line items not quoted (MFR unavailability cited).

line_items.description: Business Laptop 14" — Core i5, 16GB RAM, 512GB SSD, Windows 11 Pro

Wireless Keyboard + Mouse Combo — Business grade, 2.4GHz
USB-C Docking Station — 12-in-1, 4K HDMI, 100W PD, Ethernet

V2.notes: Grey market stock risk noted internally

questions.text: Do you offer volume discounts? If yes, at what thresholds?
What is your return/replacement policy for DOA (Dead on Arrival) items?
Are you an authorized reseller for the brands you are quoting?
What certifications does your organization hold? (ISO, MSME, etc.)
Describe your after-sales support model — escalation path, SLA.
Have you supplied to companies of similar size (500+ employees) in the last 2 years? Provide references.
What is your policy on customs/import delays for international shipments?
Do you have pan-India delivery capability?
What is your financial stability indicator? (Turnover, credit rating, or banker reference)

V1.Q1: Net 45 days from invoice date. Early payment discount of 1.5% for payment within 10 days.
V1.Q2: Yes — 3% discount on orders above ₹25L, 5% above ₹50L, negotiable above ₹1Cr.
V1.Q3: DOA replacements within 72 hours. Customer ships back, we courier replacement same day of receipt. No questions asked up to 30 days.
V1.Q4: Yes. We are authorized resellers for all brands quoted. Authorization letters available on request.
V1.Q5: ISO 9001:2015 certified. MSME registered. GeM portal registered vendor.
V1.Q6: Dedicated account manager. L1 support via email/phone within 4 business hours. L2 (on-site) within 48 hours. SLA breach triggers penalty clause.
V1.Q7: Yes — references: Infosys BPO (2025), Wipro Facilities (2024), Mphasis (2025). Contacts available.
V1.Q8: We maintain a local buffer stock of all quoted items. Import delays do not affect delivery commitments.
V1.Q9: Yes. Delivery to all 28 states and 8 UTs via 3PL partners. Insurance included.
V1.Q10: Annual turnover ₹42 Cr (FY2024). CRISIL rated BBB+. Banker reference from HDFC Bank available.

V2.Q1: Net 30 days. No early payment discount.
V2.Q2: Discount structure not formalized. Can negotiate case by case.
V2.Q3: DOA replacement within 7 working days. Customer responsible for return shipping.
V2.Q4: Authorized for most brands. Some items sourced through distributors — authorization may vary.
V2.Q5: No ISO certification currently. GST registered. Working towards ISO 9001.
V2.Q6: Support via email. Response within 24-48 hours. No formal SLA document available.
V2.Q7: Have supplied to mid-size companies. References not available for sharing at this stage.
V2.Q8: Import delays are passed on to customer with advance notice. No buffer stock maintained.
V2.Q9: Pan-India delivery available for most cities. Tier-2/3 cities may incur additional freight charges.
V2.Q10: Turnover approximately ₹18 Cr. No formal credit rating. Bank statements available on request.

V3.Q1: Net 60 days from invoice. LC acceptable for large orders above ₹1Cr.
V3.Q2: Volume discounts of 2% above ₹30L, 4% above ₹75L. Structured annually.
V3.Q3: DOA replacement within 48 hours. Dedicated logistics partner handles reverse pickup at our cost.
V3.Q4: Yes, authorized reseller for all 14 brands in our portfolio. Gold partner status with 3 OEMs.
V3.Q5: ISO 9001:2015, ISO 14001:2015 (Environmental), SA8000 (Social Accountability). NSIC registered.
V3.Q6: Named account manager + backup. 2-hour response SLA. On-site within 24 hours in metro cities. Monthly review calls.
V3.Q7: References: Tata Consultancy Services (2025), Larsen & Toubro (2024), HDFC Life Insurance (2025). All verifiable.
V3.Q8: We maintain 90-day rolling buffer stock for all A-category items. Customers are insulated from import disruptions.
V3.Q9: Yes. Own logistics in 6 metro cities. 3PL for rest of India. All deliveries fully insured.
V3.Q10: Annual turnover ₹95 Cr (FY2024). ICRA rated A-. Stable outlook confirmed by independent auditor.

V4.Q1: Net 15 days preferred. Flexible for large accounts.
V4.Q2: Flat 7% discount on all orders above ₹10L. No threshold structure beyond that.
V4.Q3: DOA replacement within 24 hours, anywhere in India. No paperwork required.
V4.Q4: We source from multiple channels to ensure best pricing. Authorization documentation available for select brands.
V4.Q5: ISO 9001:2015 (certification pending renewal), MSME, Startup India registered.
V4.Q6: WhatsApp and email support. 1-hour first response. On-site within 12 hours pan-India.
V4.Q7: We have served 50+ enterprise clients. Reference list available after NDA signing.
V4.Q8: We guarantee delivery timelines regardless of import status. Internal buffer handles all disruptions.
V4.Q9: Yes, pan-India delivery within quoted lead times.
V4.Q10: Turnover ₹8 Cr (FY2024, first full year). High-growth trajectory. No formal credit rating yet.

V5.Q1: Net 45 days. 2% early payment discount if paid within 15 days.
V5.Q3: DOA replacement within 5 working days. Reverse pickup arranged by us.
V5.Q4: Authorized reseller for primary brands quoted. Two items sourced from sub-distributors.
V5.Q5: ISO 9001:2015 certified. GeM vendor. MSME registered.
V5.Q6: Dedicated account manager. Email/phone support with 8-hour SLA. On-site support in Hyderabad and Bengaluru same day, other cities within 72 hours.
V5.Q7: References: Cognizant (2024), Minda Industries (2025). Will share contacts upon request.
V5.Q8: Partial buffer stock. Items with high import dependency may see 5–7 day variance.
V5.Q9: Yes, pan-India. Surcharge applicable for Tier-3 cities and North-East.
V5.Q10: Annual turnover ₹31 Cr (FY2024). No formal rating. Audited financials available.

attached_documents.summary: ISO 9001:2015 certificate issued by Bureau Veritas. Valid until March 2028. Scope covers procurement, warehousing, and distribution of IT hardware.
Reference letter from Infosys BPO dated Jan 2026. Confirms on-time delivery of 850 laptops and 400 peripherals. Rated 'Excellent' on quality and responsiveness.
ISO 9001:2015 and ISO 14001:2015 dual certificate issued by DNV. Valid until August 2028.
Gold Partner authorization from a leading PC OEM, valid FY2026-27. Authorizes sale and support of full product line in India.
Startup India DPIIT certificate and MCA incorporation documents. Company incorporated April 2020. Paid-up capital ₹50L.
ISO 9001:2015 certificate issued by TUV SUD. Valid until November 2026. Renewal in progress per vendor communication.

red_flags.flag: Pricing 18–25% below market across all categories — economically implausible for a 5-year-old company with ₹8Cr turnover
ISO 9001 certificate listed as 'pending renewal' — not confirmed active
References available only after NDA — non-standard and evasive for a vendor procurement process
Authorization documents 'available for select brands' — not confirmed authorized reseller
Toner cartridges listed as 'unbranded, origin not disclosed' — risk of counterfeit
Hardware security key brand not disclosed — critical for a FIDO2 security device
7 line items not quoted (LI-03 no warranty, LI-04 not quoted, LI-07 not quoted, LI-17 not quoted, LI-24 not quoted, LI-27 not quoted) — incomplete bid
No ISO certification — only vendor without any quality certification
No client references shared — cannot verify enterprise delivery track record
USB-C Docking Station (LI-10) noted internally as 'grey market stock risk'
Net 60 day payment terms are longest in the pool — cash flow impact on buyer
ISO certificate expiring November 2026 — within this contract period
4 line items not quoted (LI-03, LI-11, LI-22, LI-30)
